title: Add the explicit Demo-only Clone confirmation interface
objective: Add an accessible, feature-flagged Clone confirmation flow only within Built-in Demo Preview while keeping Open Demo and Blank Create distinct.
acceptanceCriteria: Expose the Clone CTA only inside Built-in Demo Preview; do not expose it in Lobby cards, Settings, real TripDetail, or Offline Preview.
Keep Open Demo, Blank Create, and Clone as clearly distinct operations.
Explain the owner-only result, included itinerary and checklist data, and excluded members, tickets, expenses, and attachments.
Explain that copied text-only places are unverified and may later be reselected.
Disable Confirm when storage preflight is unavailable or fails.
Prevent duplicate Confirm actions while one operation is in flight.
Expose accessible loading, success, error, and repair states.
Support keyboard interaction, focus management, and accessible names.
Remain usable on Mobile and Desktop layouts.
Keep the Clone feature flag disabled by default.
